_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PELICAN PANEL
name: s&box Dedicated Server
author: freshdoktor@freshgaming.eu
description: s&box Dedicated Server running natively on Linux with .NET Runtime.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl lib32gcc-s1 lib32stdc++6

mkdir -p /mnt/server
mkdir -p /opt/steamcmd

curl -sqL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar -xzvf - -C /opt/steamcmd

# Run SteamCMD once to let it update itself
/opt/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh +quit

BRANCH_ARG=""
if [ -n "${SBOX_BRANCH}" ]; then
    BRANCH_ARG="-beta ${SBOX_BRANCH}"
fi

/opt/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
    +login anonymous \
    +app_update 1892930 ${BRANCH_ARG} validate \
    +quit

chown -R 999:999 /mnt/server

variables.name: Game Mode
variables.description: The game mode to run on the server.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of the server as it appears in the server browser.

variables.name: Map
variables.description: The map to load on the server (leave empty for default).

variables.name: Extra Arguments
variables.description: Additional command-line arguments to pass to the server.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server.

variables.name: Game Server Token
variables.description: Steam Game Server Login Token for server authentication.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically update the server via SteamCMD on startup. Set to 1 to enable.

variables.name: Beta Branch
variables.description: SteamCMD beta branch to install (leave empty for stable).
